revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Template:Circa/doc/sortable]] redirect to enwiki [[Template:Circa/doc/sortable]]
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Circa/doc/sortable]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Circa/doc/sortable]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Circa/doc/sortable]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects C
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Circa/doc/sortable]] <noinclude></noinclude>

If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Circa%2Fdoc%2Fsortable here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
If the parameter "sortable=yes" is specified, the template generates invisible text that will cause the column to sort correctly in [[Help:Sortable tables|sortable]] [[Help:Tables|tables]]. However, it is at the cost of having that invisible text read out audibly by many [[:en:Screen reader|screen readers]]. "Col 1" without the template does not sort correctly. "Col 2" with the template and sortable=yes sorts correctly.
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}
{| class="sortable wikitable" style=text-align:right; |- ! Title!!Col 1!!Col 2 |- | style=text-align:left; | Foo|| 1066|| 1066 |- | style=text-align:left; | Bar|| c. 1510|| {{circa|1510|sortable=yes}} |- | style=text-align:left; | Baz|| 1956|| 1956 |- | style=text-align:left; | Jaz|| c. 410|| {{circa|410|sortable=yes}} |}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
